label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 16

extraction.one_line_summary: VINGEGAARD attacked with 4.8km remaining on the steep finish climb to Bejes, distancing KUSS by 1:05 and closing GC gap to 29 seconds.
tactical_patterns: GROVES prioritized intermediate sprint points over break survival, pulling out before climb knowing green jersey math favored abandonment.
INEOS Grenadiers chased after missing break formation, revealing desperation for stage opportunities with limited remaining chances.
ROGLIC deliberately checked behind for KUSS position before line, suggesting intra-team GC hierarchy still being negotiated within Jumbo-Visma.
VINGEGAARD attacked immediately upon final climb start at 4.8km, not waiting for steepest 16% gradient in final 2km.

rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: Tour de France fatigue signs completely erased, attacking strength on steep finishes returning at critical race moment
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: negative: lost 1:05 plus bonus seconds to Vingegaard on short steep climb, suggesting vulnerability on explosive gradients versus sustained efforts
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: neutral: checking for Kuss position before line indicates team dynamics unresolved, gained time on nominal leader without overtly attacking
rider_signals.FISHER BLACK Finn: positive: UAE domestique finished second on punchy climb, unexpected result reveals climbing form
rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: positive: tactical sprint point collection suggests green jersey calculation prioritized over stage hunting
